tasks.label: Open Dev DB tunnel
args: if lsof -iTCP:3307 -sTCP:LISTEN -Pn 2>/dev/null | grep -q ssh; then exit 0; fi; ssh -f -N -o ExitOnForwardFailure=yes -o ServerAliveInterval=30 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -L 3307:127.0.0.1:3306 root@automatos.ca

tasks.label: Open Prod DB tunnel
args: if lsof -iTCP:3308 -sTCP:LISTEN -Pn 2>/dev/null | grep -q ssh; then exit 0; fi; ssh -f -N -o ExitOnForwardFailure=yes -o ServerAliveInterval=30 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=accept-new -L 3308:127.0.0.1:3306 root@automatos.ca
